aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: No — The cosmos are quiet. You should be too.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today. Your Slack is not.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — Even the universe isn't sure about this one.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos signal rest and reflection. You will reflect on why your tests take 45 minutes.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: No — Even quiet cosmos can sense a bad commit message.
gemini.prophecy: The stars are silent. Your PR review notifications are not.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — Low cosmic energy means low risk tolerance.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today. You will fill the silence with unnecessary meetings.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Fortune favors the bold. And the poorly supervised.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will mistake this for an opportunity to refactor everything.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — When even the stars have no opinion, neither should your pipeline.
virgo.prophecy: A quiet cosmos means a peaceful day. Your linter has 847 warnings queued up.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — Balance is key. Flip a coin. Actually don't.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos seek balance today. Your team's PR queue does not understand balance.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Quiet cosmos are suspicious cosmos.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars are watching in silence. So is your on-call rotation.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Aim high. Miss occasionally. Ship anyway.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos whisper of adventure. Your Jira backlog whispers back, louder.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — Even the stars clock out eventually.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will use this energy to document something nobody will read.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll deploy anyway. You always deploy anyway.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos pause to reflect. You will spend this time opening 12 browser tabs and closing 11.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — A gentle cosmic silence is not a deployment window.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today. Finally, some peace. Your standup is in 4 minutes.
